meaning: United States Department of Agriculture 美国农业部
examples: What should the USDA do to achieve food security according to David Wallinga?
The town sits smack in the middle of a USDA food desert stretching miles in every direction.
Why does the author say the USDA could have contributed a lot to lowering the climate cost through its dietary guidelines?
After an exhaustive review, the USDA gave Roundup Ready Alfalfa the green light in 2005.
Beyond that, the USDA cannot approve a new seed variety until it conducts an Environmental Assessment.
